task_completion.description: Navigate to and select the correct axial slice corresponding to the L3 vertebral level on the abdominal CT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Medical imaging software (e.g., 3D Slicer) displaying an axial slice centered on the L3 vertebra, identifiable by its morphology and position.

task_completion.description: Apply appropriate Hounsfield Unit (HU) thresholding to isolate skeletal muscle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Thresholding tool active in the GUI with the range set to approximately -29 to 150 HU, highlighting the muscle tissue on the scan.

task_completion.description: Create an accurate segmentation mask of all skeletal muscles at the L3 level without including internal organs or fat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clean segmentation overlay on the L3 axial slice that covers the psoas, paraspinal, and abdominal wall muscles, strictly excluding the intestines, liver, kidneys, and subcutaneous/visceral fat.

task_completion.description: Calculate the Skeletal Muscle Area, Skeletal Muscle Index (SMI), and determine the sarcopenia classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calculator, terminal, or script output showing the calculation of SMI (Muscle Area / 1.68^2) and comparison against the male threshold (52.4 cm2/m2).

task_completion.description: Save the segmentation to l3_muscle_segmentation.nii.gz and the JSON report to sarcopenia_report.json with all required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal, or text editor showing the saved 'l3_muscle_segmentation.nii.gz' file and the 'sarcopenia_report.json' file containing fields: l3_slice_index, skeletal_muscle_area_cm2, patient_height_m, patient_sex, smi_cm2_m2, sarcopenia_threshold_cm2_m2, and sarcopenia_classification.

integrity.description: The agent used the medical imaging software's GUI to perform the segmentation rather than mocking or downloading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing active interaction with segmentation tools (e.g., Segment Editor, Threshold, Paint) inside the imaging application.

integrity.description: The agent actually measured the muscle area using the software rather than guessing or hardcoding a value.
integrity.visual_evidence: Segment Statistics module or a similar measurement tool visible in the GUI, displaying the calculated area in cm2 or mm2 for the segmented muscle.

integrity.description: The JSON report was generated based on the actual measured and calculated values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the final 'sarcopenia_report.json' logically match the measurements seen in the imaging software's statistics module and the subsequent SMI math.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The clinical threshold for sarcopenia in males is a Skeletal Muscle Index (SMI) of 52.4 cm2/m2. The standard Hounsfield Unit (HU) range for skeletal muscle segmentation on CT scans is -29 to 150.
